targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM subscription_patterns sp WHERE sp.status = 'confirmed' AND ('${tag}' = '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subscription_pattern_tags spt JOIN operator_tags ot ON ot.id = spt.tag_id WHERE spt.pattern_id = sp.id AND ot.slug = '${tag}'))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ABS(sp.current_amount) * CASE WHEN sp.interval_days <= 8 THEN 4.33 WHEN sp.interval_days <= 16 THEN 2.165 WHEN sp.interval_days <= 32 THEN 1 WHEN sp.interval_days <= 95 THEN 0.33 WHEN sp.interval_days >= 350 THEN 0.0833 ELSE 1 END), 0)::numeric AS value FROM subscription_patterns sp WHERE sp.status = 'confirmed' AND ('${tag}' = '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM subscription_pattern_tags spt JOIN operator_tags ot ON ot.id = spt.tag_id WHERE spt.pattern_id = sp.id AND ot.slug = '${tag}'))
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM subscription_patterns WHERE status = 'pending'

panels.description: Empty table is expected when no price_increase or price_decrease events occurred in the last 90 days — not a sync or detection defect.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.display_name, e.occurred_at::date AS date, e.previous_amount AS before_amount, e.amount AS after_amount, e.delta_pct FROM subscription_price_events e JOIN subscription_patterns p ON p.id = e.pattern_id WHERE e.event_type IN ('price_increase', 'price_decrease') AND e.occurred_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY e.occurred_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Price changes (90 days)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*)::float AS value FROM subscription_patterns WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.name: tag
list.query: SELECT '' AS __value, 'All tags' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT ot.slug AS __value, ot.name AS __text FROM operator_tags ot ORDER BY 2
